description: Generic rules for converting raw data into normalized node scores.

latest_level_passthrough.description: Use when input value is already a normalized score in [-2, 2].

change_zscore.description: Convert latest one-period change into a z-score against recent changes.

level_zscore.description: Convert latest level into a z-score against recent levels.

percent_change_zscore.description: Convert latest percent change into a z-score against recent percent changes.
